display.purpose: Page titles, StatCard numbers, brand moments.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: State transitions on buttons and nav items.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main actions: save, catat penjualan, masuk.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--primary, #7d9b76); color: var(--primary-foreground, #faf8f5); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, #7d9b76 90%, black); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7d9b76; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; border: 1px solid #ddd5c8; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: #2d2d2d; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(220, 230, 216, 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7d9b76; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.html: <label class="ds-label" for="ds-input">Nama pelanggan</label><input id="ds-input" class="ds-input" placeholder="Tulis nama" />
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #2d2d2d; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #ddd5c8; border-radius: 12px; background: #f0ebe3; color: #2d2d2d; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7d9b76; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.html: Belum Bayar hari iniRp 1.250.000
components.css: .ds-stat-card { position: relative; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #ddd5c8; border-radius: 16px; background: #f0ebe3; } .ds-stat-label { display: block; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #5c5c5c; } .ds-stat-value { display: block; margin-top: 8px; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2d2d2d; }

components.name: Status Badge Unpaid
components.css: .ds-badge-warning { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(196, 132, 58, 0.15); color: #c4843a; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.html: Beranda
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 12px; color: #2d2d2d; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-nav-active { background: #dce6d8; color: #2d4a2d; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview: HL App terlihat seperti buku bon toko yang dirapikan untuk layar: krem hangat, hijau sage lembut, angka Fraunces yang tenang, dan ruang napas cukup antar elemen.

rules.name: The Token-Only Rule
rules.body: Selalu pakai token semantic. Kelas warna mentah dilarang.

rules.name: The Flat Card Rule
rules.body: Kartu di rest state tanpa shadow besar.

rules.name: The Balance Rule
rules.body: text-wrap balance pada h1–h3; pretty pada paragraf.

dos: Do pakai istilah UI Indonesia: Catat Penjualan, Belum Bayar, Sudah Bayar.
Do format rupiah Rp 1.250.000 dan tanggal panjang 12 Juni 2026.
Do konfirmasi dialog untuk hapus dan tandai bayar.
donts: Don't pakai gradient text, glassmorphism default, side-stripe border.
Don't sebut piutang ke pengguna; gunakan Belum Bayar.
